ddt:Target.Name: ITM P2 V4.1
ddt:Target.Description:
IT master ECU navigation
X91, X95, L43
20 11 06, V2.5, Vehicle type list update, VDiag 04 08 02 07, V3.0 CBox, premium amplifier, TFT, rear cam configuration addition, VDiag 05 22 10 07, V3.1 rear cam configuration update, corrections 17 01 08, V3.2 microphone test screen addition, ident auto PSP2 D91 22 09 08, V4.0 rear camera picture configuration addition, VDiag 06 24 06 09, V4.1 L43 addition
Lionel Pelletier untill V4.0 Cleber Jacintho from V4.1

Item.Text: Flash ROM error of control unit

Data.Name: Output Permanent Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Item.Text: open circuit or short circuit to ground
open circuit or short circuit to battery
test card 1 color bars on progress
test card 2 grey scales on progress
test card 3 white screen on progress

Data.Name: Session Name
Data.Comment: Mode d'ouverture de la section diag

Data.Name: configCameraPictureColorDay
Data.Comment: rear camera picture color day configuration

Data.Name: configCameraPictureBrightnessDay
Data.Comment: rear camera picture brightness day configuration

Data.Name: configCameraPictureTintDay
Data.Comment: rear camera picture tint day configuration

Data.Name: configCameraPictureContrastDay
Data.Comment: rear camera picture contrast day configuration

Data.Comment: rear camera picture tint night configuration

Data.Name: configCameraPictureContrastNight
Data.Comment: rear camera picture contrast night configuration

Data.Name: configCameraPictureColorNight
Data.Comment: rear camera picture color night configuration

Data.Name: configCameraPictureBrightnessNight
Data.Comment: rear camera picture brightness night configuration

Data.Name: parameterBluetooth device 01 address
Data.Comment: adresse Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus faible

Data.Name: parameterBluetooth device 01 level
Data.Comment: niveau de réception Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus faible

Data.Name: parameterBluetooth device 01 name
Data.Comment: nom Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus faible

Data.Name: parameterBluetooth device 05 address
Data.Comment: adresse Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus fort

Data.Name: parameterBluetooth device 05 level
Data.Comment: niveau de réception Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus fort

Data.Name: parameterBluetooth device 05 name
Data.Comment: nom Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus fort

Data.Name: parameterGPSSTATpositionning
Data.Comment: niveau de réception GPS: positionning status

Data.Name: parameterGPSSTATnumber
Data.Comment: niveau de réception GPS: number of satellites

Data.Name: parameterGPSSTAT3D positionning
Data.Comment: niveau de réception GPS: 3D positionning status

Data.Name: parameterGPSSTAT2D positionning
Data.Comment: niveau de réception GPS: 2D positionning status

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Numero de DVD de Navigation en Hexa

Data.Name: Statusfascia close
Data.Comment: open / close button for map DVD

Request.Name: Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: Test display grey scale test card

Device.Name: Flash ROM error of control unit

Send.RequestName: Test display grey scale test card
Test display grey scale test card

Button.Text: HFCK: audio lines test (need test stub)
HFCK: serial lines test (need test stub)

Label.Text: Guide lines are OK if sound can be heard
Microphone is OK if Status is OK (wait 6 seconds)
2) attendre 15 secondes pour la mise à jour
Etat du téléphone du berceau (ITS phase 1, X73, X74, J84)
